Pure Renewal / About Us

ABOUT
US.

Regenerative Concierge Medicine · Downtown Orlando

At Pure Renewal, we blend the most advanced scientific therapies with personalized, concierge-style care. Our goal is simple: to help you renew, restore, and thrive — in a world-class environment where every detail supports healing and longevity.

Request a Consultation Our Services →
Scroll to explore
Our Mission

More Than
Healthcare.
A Partnership.

01
Renew
Cellular regeneration and biological restoration at every level of your physiology.
02
Restore
Returning the body to its optimal state of balance, energy, and natural resilience.
03
Thrive
Empowering peak performance, longevity, and vitality far beyond conventional medicine.
04
Partnership
A physician invested in every step of your journey — not just your symptoms.

At Pure Renewal Regenerative Concierge Medicine, it is more than just convenient access to a physician — it's a partnership in your health journey.

We go beyond symptom management and traditional protocols to focus on the root causes of imbalance, empowering your body to heal, restore, and thrive.

Our concierge approach blends advanced therapies — such as peptide therapy, ozone therapy, chelation, and IV infusions — with personalized care and ongoing support. Every treatment plan is tailored to unlock cellular renewal, optimize energy, and extend vitality far beyond the limits of conventional medicine.

This is more than healthcare — it's a commitment to vitality, resilience, and living life fully. With a physician who is invested in every step of your journey — from your first consultation to long-term biomarker tracking and protocol refinement.

Our state-of-the-art facility in Downtown Orlando is designed for comfort, innovation, and complete privacy. We welcome patients locally and from across the country, with easy access to Orlando Executive Airport for private jet arrivals and Orlando International Airport just 25 minutes away.

"Excellence isn't an option — it's our standard. Whether you're seeking relief, exploring regenerative therapies, or pursuing longevity, we offer the most advanced solutions in a world-class setting."

Pure Renewal · Core Philosophy
Restorative Services

Everything
We Offer.

Every service at Pure Renewal is physician-led, evidence-based, and tailored to your unique biology and goals.

01
Weight Loss
Physician Weight Loss
GLP-1, 2 and 3 — physician-supervised protocols targeting fat loss while preserving lean muscle. Real results, real patients.
02
Energy
Nano NAD+
Increases energy, mitochondrial support, reduces inflammation. Restore cellular function from the inside out.
03
Performance
Male Performance Booster
Treats ED and supports longer erections. Physician-supervised peptide and hormone protocols for men.
04
Cognitive
Cognitive Enhancement
Brain support and neuroprotection. Sharpen focus, improve memory, and support long-term cognitive health.
05
Oncology
Hi-Dose Vitamin C
Supportive oncology support via high-dose IV infusions. Oxidative therapy for immune fortification and cellular repair.
06
Regenerative
Stem Cell Therapy
Tailored cell-based medicine targeting tissue repair, inflammation reduction, and biological age reversal.
07
Precision
Peptide Therapy
Tailored to your specific needs. From longevity and recovery to immune support and hormonal balance.
08
Skin
Microneedling
Stem cell and salmon DNA infusion. Repair and renew skin from within at a cellular level.
09
Oxygen
Ozone Therapy
Enhance oxygen efficiency. Elevate cellular vitality. Targeted ozone for systemic renewal and immune activation.
10
Light
Red Light Therapy
Heal faster, feel better, age gracefully. Photobiomodulation for tissue repair, inflammation reduction, and skin health.
11
Integrative
Integrative Oncology
Blends the best of conventional and regenerative medicine for comprehensive cancer support alongside traditional care.
12
Genetics
Genetic Bio-Testing
Genomic analysis to guide precision protocols tailored to your unique biological blueprint for optimal outcomes.
13
Cellular Detox
EBOO Therapy
Detoxify on a cellular level. Extracorporeal Blood Ozonation and Oxygenation — advanced immune and cellular restoration.
14
IV
IV Therapy Infusions
Restore lost nutrients. Physician-formulated IV infusions delivering essential vitamins, minerals, and compounds directly into the bloodstream.
15
Diagnostics
PNOĒ Metabolic Testing
Clinical-grade breath analysis. The most accurate assessment of metabolic rate, VO2 max, and biological age available.
16
Nutrition
Nutritional Supplements
Physician-curated supplement protocols designed to complement your regenerative therapy plan and support ongoing vitality.
Our Core Approach

The Perfect
Trifecta.

What sets Pure Renewal apart is our integrative approach to cellular restoration — built upon the perfect trifecta of regenerative therapy. These three pillars work in synergy to restore the body's natural balance and regenerative capacity from within.

Bio-Identical
Hormones

Precision hormone restoration using compounds molecularly identical to those produced naturally by the body. We optimize hormonal balance to restore energy, mood, metabolism, and vitality.

Testosterone Estrogen Progesterone Thyroid DHEA
Peptide
Therapy

Short chains of amino acids that act as precise biological messengers — signaling the body to perform specific regenerative functions at a cellular level. Tailored protocols for every need.

Epithalon MOTS-c NMN Retatrutide Semax BPC-157
Stem Cell
Therapy

Cell-based regenerative medicine harnessing the body's own regenerative capacity. Stem cells are deployed to target tissue repair, inflammation reduction, and biological age reversal.

Tissue Repair Anti-Inflammatory Age Reversal Joint Health Neural Support
Our Facility

World-Class
Environment.

Located in the heart of Downtown Orlando — designed for comfort, innovation, and complete privacy. State of Florida approved for office-based surgery.

Level 3 Surgical Facility
State of Florida approved for office-based surgery
Board-Certified Specialists
Multidisciplinary team across 6+ specialties

Brochure.

Request a Consultation

Start Your
Journey.

Every patient begins with a complimentary physician consultation — no pressure, no commitments. Just a real conversation about your health, your goals, and what's possible.

Complimentary consultation — every new patient receives a full physician evaluation at no cost.
No wait times — direct access to your physician from day one, with same-day appointments available.
0% patient financing — memberships starting at $199/month with flexible, interest-free payment plans.
Tele-health available — connect with your physician from anywhere via video or phone consultation.
Complete privacy — all patient information is handled with strict confidentiality and medical-grade discretion.
Request Consult

Fill out the form below and our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your complimentary physician consultation.
